# ModularSlicer Spec Runner

Execute one prepared ModularSlicer packet and nothing else.

## Backlog Source

- `./docs/07_implementation_status.md` is the canonical backlog and prioritization source.
- It is not permission to broaden scope beyond the active packet.

## Active Packet Selection

1. Search `./.ralph/specs/*/packet.spec.md`, excluding `./.ralph/specs/_templates/`.
2. Exactly one packet must declare `status: active` in front matter.
3. If zero or multiple packets are active, stop and... [truncated, 1667 chars total]
Test
Multiple active packets: 02_runtime-access-audit-and-declaration-enforcement and 03_wit-consolidation-and-custom-type-widening both claim status: active. Exactly one must be active.
Multiple active packets: 02_runtime-access-audit-and-declaration-enforcement and 03_wit-consolidation-and-custom-type-widening both claim status: active. Exactly one must be active.

Multiple active packets: 02_runtime-access-audit-and-declaration-enforcement and 03_wit-consolidation-and-custom-type-widening both claim status: active in packet.spec.md front matter. Exactly one must be active. Both packets have status: active on line 2 of their packet.spec.md files.
Two packets claim status: active: 02_runtime-access-audit-and-declaration-enforcement and 03_wit-consolidation-and-custom-type-widening. Exactly one must be active. Please deactivate one packet.

Active packet: 02_runtime-access-audit-and-declaration-enforcement. Next step: Step 2 - TASK-123a (prepass audit collection). ModuleAccessAudit already exists. Need to implement audit collection at WIT boundary for prepass execution paths and aggregate into DagValidationRequest.access_audits. Files: crates/slicer-host/src/scheduler/. Docs: docs/01, docs/03, docs/04.

TASK-123a complete: execute_prepass and execute_prepass_with_builtins now return Vec<ModuleAccessAudit>; PipelineOutput includes prepass_audits field; ir_path_for_prepass_output helper maps stage outputs to IR paths
TASK-125 claim transition matrix enforcement: validate_claim_conflicts now uses scope_key_without_layer for non-transitionable claims; 4/4 claim_transition_matrix_tdd tests pass; docs/07 updated
claim_transition_matrix: 4/4 pass, core_module_ir_access: 3/3 pass, docs/07 TASK-125 updated. Benchy e2e failures are pre-existing dependency cycle outside packet scope.

TASK-123b: per-layer audit collection implemented. execute_single_layer returns (LayerCollectionIR, Vec<ModuleAccessAudit>). execute_per_layer_with_events returns (Vec<LayerCollectionIR>, Vec<ModuleAccessAudit>). PipelineOutput.layer_audits populated. ir_path_for_layer_stage maps PerimeterIR/InfillIR/SupportIR/LayerCollectionIR per stage. Tests: 10/10 layer_executor_tdd, 4/4 claim_transition_matrix, 3/3 core_module_ir_access pass.

Packet: 02_runtime-access-audit-and-declaration-enforcement, Step 4: Postpass audit collection (TASK-123c). Task IDs: TASK-123c. Files: crates/slicer-host/src/postpass.rs, crates/slicer-host/src/pipeline.rs. Authoritative docs: docs/01_system_architecture.md (Module Access Contract). OrcaSlicer refs: None. Verification: cargo test --package slicer-host --test postpass_executor_tdd -- --nocapture.

TASK-123c complete: postpass audit collection implemented. execute_postpass returns (String, Vec<ModuleAccessAudit>). PipelineOutput.postpass_audits added. 15/15 postpass_executor_tdd tests pass, 5/5 python_bridge_tdd tests pass.

payload.action_required: Add a live-path regression test that exercises the full pipeline and asserts that access_audits are non-empty in PipelineOutput, proving populated audits reach the execution output.
payload.incomplete_reason: postpass audit collection is implemented and PipelineOutput.postpass_audits is populated, but the live-path regression test (access_audits_live_path) specified in Step 4 verification command does not exist. The implementation-plan.md verification command cargo test --package slicer-host -- test access_audits_live_path returns no matches.
payload.step_title: Step 4 incomplete: live-path regression test missing

payload: TASK-123c Step 4 live-path regression test added: access_audits_live_path passes (1/1), full pipeline_tdd suite green (10/10)

Packet 02 Step 4 (TASK-123c): postpass audit collection complete. Acceptance checks: (1) cargo test --package slicer-host --test pipeline_tdd -- access_audits_live_path --nocapture → 1/1, (2) cargo test --package slicer-host --test postpass_executor_tdd -- --nocapture → 15/15, (3) cargo test --package slicer-host --test python_bridge_tdd -- --nocapture → 5/5, (4) cargo build --workspace clean, (5) docs/07 TASK-123c marked [x]

Packet 02 Step 4 TASK-123c: postpass audit collection complete. All acceptance criteria green: access_audits_live_path 1/1, postpass_executor_tdd 15/15, python_bridge_tdd 5/5, cargo build --workspace clean, docs/07 TASK-123c marked [x].

Packet 02 Step 5: TASK-124 undeclared access enforcement at WIT boundary. Modules: crates/slicer-host/src/wit/, crates/slicer-host/src/scheduler/. Docs: docs/03_wit_and_manifest.md rows 26-49. Verification: negative test in acceptance_gate_gaps_tdd.rs.

TASK-124 (undeclared access enforcement) complete. validate_undeclared_access already correctly checks runtime audits against declared manifest paths. Negative harness in acceptance_gate_gaps_tdd.rs passes all 3 tests. All 56 related tests green. docs/07 updated.
Packet 02 Step: TASK-124 undeclared access enforcement. All 13 acceptance_gate_gaps_tdd tests pass. TASK-124 marked [x] in docs/07. Packet still open: TASK-126 (WriteConflict.orderable) pending.

TASK-126 WriteConflict.orderable fixed. orderable now computed correctly: true when at least one module reads the conflicting field, false when neither. Added dag_validation_tdd test. All validation tests pass (7 dag, 4 claim_matrix, 13 acceptance_gate, 3 ir_access). Packet 02 complete.

Packet 02 runtime-access-audit-and-declaration-enforcement ready for verification. All 8 tasks complete: TASK-121/122 (manifest), TASK-123a/b/c (audits), TASK-124 (undeclared access), TASK-125 (claim matrix), TASK-126 (orderable). Verification commands: cargo test --package slicer-host --test dag_validation_tdd --test claim_transition_matrix_tdd --test acceptance_gate_gaps_tdd --test core_module_ir_access_contract_tdd -- --nocapture
